meals.name: Smoked Salmon & Avocado on Sourdough
meals.image_prompt: Close-up plate of toasted sourdough topped with creamy avocado slices and smoked salmon, garnished with fresh lemon wedge and dill, natural morning light, minimalist plating
prep_steps: Slice sourdough bread and store in airtight container
Portion smoked salmon into 2 containers (Diego 80g, Diana 60g)
Portion avocado quarters into 2 containers
day_of_steps: Add squeeze of fresh lemon juice

meals.name: Almonds & Apple
meals.image_prompt: Wooden cutting board with a sliced red apple and a small glass bowl of roasted almonds, soft natural window light
day_of_steps: Portion almonds into small bowl (Diego 30g, Diana 20g)

meals.name: Mediterranean Grilled Chicken with Roasted Vegetables & Quinoa
meals.image_prompt: Bowl with fluffy white quinoa, sliced grilled chicken breast, roasted zucchini and bell peppers, cherry tomatoes, drizzle of olive oil, fresh herbs, warm natural light
prep_steps: Cook 600g quinoa (cuit mesure: 1.5 cups dry = ~4.5 cups cooked), divide into 7 portions (Diego 180g, Diana 130g)
Grill/bake 8 chicken breasts (1200g total raw), slice, portion into containers (Diego 200g/day, Diana 150g/day)
Roast mixed vegetables (zucchini, bell peppers, carrots, cherry tomatoes) in large batches, portion daily
day_of_steps: Reheat 180g (Diego) or 130g (Diana) quinoa in microwave 2 min
Arrange on plate, drizzle with 2 tsp olive oil (Diego) or 1.5 tsp (Diana)
Add pinch of fresh oregano, serve with 500ml water

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Walnuts & Berries
meals.image_prompt: White bowl of thick Greek yogurt topped with crushed walnuts and fresh raspberries, drizzle of honey, served on marble surface, bright studio light
prep_steps: Portion Greek yogurt into 7 containers (Diego 200g, Diana 150g)
Portion walnuts into small bags (Diego 25g, Diana 20g)
day_of_steps: Top with walnuts and fresh berries (raspberries or blueberries)

meals.name: Baked White Fish with Lemon, Green Beans & Sweet Potato
meals.image_prompt: Elegant plate with flaked white fish fillet, steamed green beans piled to one side, sliced roasted sweet potato, fresh lemon slice as garnish, light herb oil, soft evening light
prep_steps: Prep 7 white fish fillets (sea bass/dorade, 160g Diego / 120g Diana each), store in airtight container
Blanch and portion green beans (Diana 150g, Diego 200g)
Roast sweet potato slices, portion by day
day_of_steps: Place fish fillet on parchment paper
Top with squeeze of lemon juice, pinch of sea salt, 0.5 tsp olive oil
Plate fish, vegetables, serve with 500ml water

ingredients.item: White fish fillet (dorade ou bar blanc)
White fish fillet (dorade ou bar blanc)

meals.name: Herb Omelette with Whole-Grain Toast & Berries
meals.image_prompt: Fluffy herb omelette folded on white plate, golden whole-grain toast on side, fresh strawberries scattered, pat of butter, fresh chives sprinkled, bright kitchen light
prep_steps: Portion whole-grain bread into 7 slices (store in airtight container)
Chop fresh herbs (dill, chives, parsley), store in small container
day_of_steps: Heat 1 tsp butter in non-stick pan over medium heat
Whisk 3 eggs (Diego) or 2 eggs (Diana) in bowl, add pinch of salt, fresh herbs
Pour into pan, cook 3 min until edges set, fold gently
Toast 1 slice whole-grain bread, light butter

meals.name: Cashews & Pear
meals.image_prompt: Ripe pear sliced in half on ceramic plate, roasted cashews in small glass bowl beside, soft natural light, wooden background

meals.name: Spiced Turkey Meatballs with Brown Lentil Salad & Roasted Beets
meals.image_prompt: Plate of 3 golden turkey meatballs, mounded brown lentil salad with fresh parsley, roasted beet slices, drizzle of balsamic, lemon wedge, rustic light
prep_steps: Mix & bake 12 turkey meatballs (600g ground turkey, herbs, spices), cool, portion into 7 containers (3 meatballs Diego, 2.5 Diana)
Cook 1 cup dry brown lentils, portion daily (Diego 1 cup cooked, Diana 0.75 cup)
Roast beets, slice, portion into containers (Diego 200g, Diana 150g)
day_of_steps: Reheat 3 (Diego) or 2.5 (Diana) meatballs in oven 4 min at 180°C
Reheat lentils, toss with 2 tbsp fresh parsley, 1 tsp balsamic vinegar, 1 tsp olive oil
Plate meatballs, lentil salad, beets, serve with 500ml water

meals.name: Hummus with Vegetable Crudités
meals.image_prompt: White bowl of creamy hummus drizzled with olive oil, surrounded by sliced carrots, celery sticks, and cherry tomatoes on a wooden board, natural light
prep_steps: Portion store-bought or homemade hummus into 7 containers (Diego 80g, Diana 60g)
Slice carrots, celery, store in airtight container with damp paper towel
day_of_steps: Arrange carrot sticks, celery, cherry tomatoes around hummus

meals.name: Lean Ground Beef & Chickpea Taco Bowls (Mexican Style)
meals.image_prompt: Deconstructed taco bowl with spiced lean ground beef, cooked chickpeas, shredded red cabbage, diced bell peppers, avocado slices, lime wedge, cilantro, corn tortillas on side, warm light
prep_steps: Brown 600g lean ground beef with cumin, chili, lime juice; divide into 7 portions
Cook 1.5 cups dry chickpeas (or use canned, drained), portion daily (Diego 0.75 cup, Diana 0.6 cup)
Shred red cabbage, store in container (prepare fresh each day or use 5 days' worth)
Prep diced bell peppers, cilantro, lime juice
day_of_steps: Arrange in bowl: cooked beef, chickpeas, 1 cup shredded red cabbage, 1/2 cup diced bell peppers
Top with cilantro, squeeze lime juice
Warm 2 corn tortillas (Diego) or 1.5 (Diana) in pan 30 sec per side
Serve bowl with tortillas on side, 500ml water

meals.name: Kefir Bowl with Granola, Walnuts & Blueberries
meals.image_prompt: Glass bowl filled with thick kefir, crunchy granola clusters, crushed walnuts, fresh blueberries scattered on top, honey drizzle, morning sunlight, minimalist background
prep_steps: Portion kefir into 7 containers (Diego 250ml, Diana 200ml)
Portion granola clusters (no added sugar) into bags (Diego 40g, Diana 30g)
Portion walnuts into bags (Diego 25g, Diana 20g)
day_of_steps: Top with granola, walnuts, fresh blueberries

meals.name: Pistachios & Nectarine
meals.image_prompt: Ripe nectarine sliced into wedges on white plate, shelled pistachios in small ceramic bowl, natural diffused light, clean background

meals.name: Pan-Seared Salmon with Asparagus & Wild Rice
meals.image_prompt: Plate with perfectly seared salmon fillet, pale pink center, bright green asparagus spears, fluffy wild rice, fresh dill garnish, lemon slice, warm kitchen light
prep_steps: Portion 8 salmon fillets (170g Diego, 130g Diana), store separately in airtight containers
Cook 1.5 cups dry wild rice, divide into portions (Diego 200g cooked, Diana 150g cooked)
Blanch asparagus, portion into containers (Diego 250g, Diana 200g)
day_of_steps: Heat 1 tsp olive oil in non-stick pan over medium-high heat
Pat salmon dry, place skin-side down 4 min until skin crisps
Flip, cook 3 min until just opaque inside
Plate salmon, rice, asparagus, garnish with fresh dill & lemon, serve with 500ml water

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Pistachios
meals.image_prompt: White ceramic bowl of creamy Greek yogurt topped with crushed pistachios and tiny drizzle of honey, spoon resting inside, natural soft light
prep_steps: Portion Greek yogurt into 7 containers (Diego 220g, Diana 170g)
Portion pistachios into small bags (Diego 25g, Diana 20g)

meals.name: Herb-Crusted Chicken Breast with Roasted Root Vegetables & Farro
meals.image_prompt: Plate with herb-crusted golden chicken breast, roasted parsnips and carrots in chunky pieces, fluffy farro grain, fresh thyme sprig, warm earthy tones, cozy light
prep_steps: Season & roast 7 chicken breasts (180g Diego, 140g Diana) with herbs, cool, store in containers
Cook 1.5 cups dry farro, portion daily (Diego 180g cooked, Diana 130g cooked)
Roast mixed root vegetables (carrots, parsnips, celery root), portion into containers (Diego 250g, Diana 200g)
day_of_steps: Plate chicken, farro, roasted vegetables, garnish with fresh thyme, drizzle 1 tsp olive oil (Diego) or 0.75 tsp (Diana)

ingredients.item: Herb-crusted chicken breast (blanc de poulet aux herbes)
Herb-crusted chicken breast (blanc de poulet aux herbes)

meals.name: Cottage Cheese with Walnuts, Honey & Orange
meals.image_prompt: White bowl of creamy cottage cheese, scattered walnuts, fresh orange segments, light honey drizzle, clean modern plating, bright natural light
prep_steps: Portion cottage cheese into 7 containers (Diego 250g, Diana 200g)
Portion walnuts into bags (Diego 30g, Diana 25g)
day_of_steps: Drizzle light honey (1 tsp Diego, 0.75 tsp Diana)

meals.name: Almonds & Apple
meals.image_prompt: Green Granny Smith apple sliced into 8 wedges on wooden board, roasted almonds piled in small ceramic cup, soft daylight, rustic style

meals.name: Grilled Chicken Souvlaki with Tzatziki, Roasted Vegetables & Bulgur
meals.image_prompt: Skewered chicken pieces charred at edges on white plate, dollop of white tzatziki sauce, roasted zucchini and tomatoes, fluffy bulgur wheat, lemon wedge, Mediterranean herbs scattered, warm light
prep_steps: Marinate & grill 8 chicken souvlaki (200g Diego, 150g Diana), cool, store in containers
Cook 1.5 cups dry bulgur, portion daily (Diego 200g cooked, Diana 150g cooked)
Prepare tzatziki sauce (Greek yogurt, cucumber, garlic, lemon), portion into containers (Diego 80g, Diana 60g)
Roast vegetables (zucchini, tomato, bell pepper), portion into containers (Diego 250g, Diana 200g)
day_of_steps: Arrange chicken, vegetables, bulgur, serve with lemon, 500ml water

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Blueberries & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: Tall glass of thick Greek yogurt, fresh blueberries scattered on top, sliced almonds, spoon nestled in, marble countertop, soft afternoon light
prep_steps: Portion Greek yogurt into 7 containers (Diego 210g, Diana 160g)
Portion almonds into small bags (Diego 25g, Diana 20g)
day_of_steps: Pour yogurt into bowl or glass
Top with blueberries and sliced almonds

meals.name: Baked Cod with Fennel, Tomato Confit & Whole-Grain Couscous
meals.image_prompt: Flaky white cod fillet on bed of fluffy couscous, roasted fennel wedges, slow-cooked tomato confit, fresh basil leaf, drizzle of olive oil, Provençal herbs, soft golden light
prep_steps: Portion 7 cod fillets (150g Diego, 120g Diana), store separately in airtight containers
Cook 1.5 cups dry whole-grain couscous, portion daily (Diego 180g cooked, Diana 140g cooked)
Slow-roast tomato confit with fennel, portion into containers (Diego 200g, Diana 160g)
day_of_steps: Place cod on parchment, drizzle 1 tsp olive oil (Diego) or 0.75 tsp (Diana), season with sea salt & herbs
Plate cod over couscous, top with confit, garnish with fresh basil, serve with 500ml water

meals.name: Baked Eggs in Avocado with Whole-Grain Toast & Tomatoes
meals.image_prompt: Halved avocado with runny baked egg yolk nestled inside, whole-grain toast soldiers on side, roasted cherry tomatoes, sprinkle of sea salt and chives, wooden board, warm morning light
prep_steps: Halve & scoop avocados (2 halves per person), store in containers with lemon juice to prevent browning
Slice whole-grain bread, store in airtight container
Slice cherry tomatoes or roast lightly, store in small container
day_of_steps: Place avocado halves in small baking dish, crack 1 egg (Diego) or 0.75 egg (Diana) into each hollow
Bake 8 min until egg white sets, yolk remains runny
Toast 1 slice whole-grain bread, light butter
Plate avocado eggs, toast, tomatoes, sprinkle chives, serve with 500ml water

meals.name: Walnuts & Kiwi
meals.image_prompt: Two halved kiwi fruits showing bright green flesh and tiny black seeds, whole walnuts scattered beside, white background, clean bright light
day_of_steps: Slice 2 kiwis per person, remove skin

meals.name: Thai-Inspired Green Curry Chicken with Jasmine Rice & Bok Choy
meals.image_prompt: Bowl of jasmine rice topped with creamy green curry sauce with tender chicken pieces, fresh bok choy florets, Thai basil leaf, lime wedge, coconut cream swirl visible, warm exotic light
prep_steps: Cook 2 cups dry jasmine rice, portion daily (Diego 200g cooked, Diana 150g cooked)
Prepare green curry sauce (coconut milk, green paste, lime), portion into containers with separate chicken (Diego 200g raw/150g cooked chicken, Diana 150g raw/110g cooked)
Blanch bok choy, portion into containers (Diego 200g, Diana 150g)
day_of_steps: Reheat curry sauce with chicken in pan 5 min over medium heat
Plate rice, top with curry and chicken, arrange bok choy, garnish with Thai basil & lime, serve with 500ml water

meals.name: Cashews & Peach
meals.image_prompt: Fresh peach halved and pitted, roasted cashews in small glass dish, soft peachy natural light, wooden cutting board

meals.name: Lean Beef Steak with Roasted Broccoli, Cauliflower & Sweet Potato
meals.image_prompt: Medium-rare lean sirloin steak with beautiful crust, florets of roasted broccoli and cauliflower, roasted sweet potato wedges, fleur de sel, fresh cracked pepper, warm bistro light
prep_steps: Portion 7 lean sirloin steaks (180g Diego, 140g Diana), store separately in airtight containers
Roast broccoli & cauliflower florets, portion into containers (Diego 280g, Diana 220g)
Roast sweet potato wedges, portion into containers (Diego 150g, Diana 120g)
day_of_steps: Remove steak from fridge 10 min before cooking
Heat 1 tsp olive oil in skillet over high heat until smoking
Season steak with sea salt & pepper, sear 4 min per side for medium-rare (180g Diego steak), adjust time for Diana (140g steak ~3 min per side)
Plate steak, vegetables, serve with 500ml water

ingredients.item: Lean sirloin steak (steak de surlonge maigre)
Lean sirloin steak (steak de surlonge maigre)

meals.name: Poached Eggs on Sprouted-Grain Toast with Tomato & Herbs
meals.image_prompt: Two perfectly poached eggs with soft yolks on toasted sprouted-grain bread, fresh heirloom tomato slice, microgreens and basil, drizzle of truffle oil, white plate, morning sunlight
day_of_steps: Toast 1 slice sprouted-grain bread (Diego 45g, Diana 35g), light butter
Bring water to simmer with splash of white vinegar
Crack 2 eggs (Diego) or 1.5 eggs (Diana) gently into water, poach 3 min until whites set, yolk runny
Plate toast, top with poached eggs, tomato slice, fresh herbs (dill & basil), serve with 500ml water

meals.name: Almonds & Strawberries
meals.image_prompt: Fresh ripe strawberries arranged on white plate, roasted almonds in small ceramic bowl beside, morning dew on berries, bright natural light
day_of_steps: Slice 200g fresh strawberries per person (Diego 200g, Diana 160g)

meals.name: Mediterranean Seafood Pasta (Whole-Grain): Shrimp & Mussels with Tomato Basil
meals.image_prompt: Plate of whole-grain pasta with succulent pink shrimp and dark mussels in shells, bright tomato sauce with fresh basil, parmesan shaving, olive oil glisten, warm Mediterranean light
prep_steps: Cook 500g dry whole-grain pasta, divide into 7 portions (Diego 180g cooked, Diana 130g cooked), store in airtight containers
Blanch & portion shrimp (Diego 120g raw/100g cooked, Diana 90g raw/75g cooked) & mussels (Diego 150g raw/120g cooked, Diana 120g raw/95g cooked)
Prepare fresh tomato basil sauce, portion into containers (Diego 200ml, Diana 160ml)
day_of_steps: Reheat sauce in pan 2 min over medium heat
Add pre-cooked shrimp and mussels to sauce, warm 2 min
Top with fresh basil and light grating of Parmigiano, serve with 500ml water

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Walnuts & Raspberries
meals.image_prompt: Glass bowl of thick creamy Greek yogurt, crushed walnuts scattered, fresh dark raspberries on top, honey drizzle, white spoon, soft diffused light
day_of_steps: Spoon Greek yogurt into bowl (Diego 220g, Diana 170g)
Top with walnuts (Diego 25g, Diana 20g) and fresh raspberries (Diego 120g, Diana 100g)

meals.name: Roasted Chicken Thigh with Root Vegetable Medley & Farro
meals.image_prompt: Golden-brown roasted chicken thigh with crispy skin, medley of caramelized parsnips, carrots, celery root, fluffy nutty farro, fresh rosemary sprig, rich bistro lighting
prep_steps: Season & roast 7 chicken thighs (bone-in, skin-on; 220g Diego, 170g Diana each), cool, portion into containers
Cook 1.5 cups dry farro, portion daily (Diego 190g cooked, Diana 140g cooked)
Roast root vegetables (carrots, parsnips, celery root), portion into containers (Diego 280g, Diana 220g)
day_of_steps: Plate chicken, farro, vegetables, garnish with fresh rosemary, drizzle 1 tsp (Diego) or 0.75 tsp (Diana) olive oil, serve with 500ml water

ingredients.item: Roasted chicken thigh (cuisse de poulet rôtie)
Roasted chicken thigh (cuisse de poulet rôtie)

meals.name: Smoked Trout & Cream Cheese on Multigrain Toast with Cucumber & Dill
meals.image_prompt: Toasted multigrain bread topped with thin spread of cream cheese, flakes of smoked trout, thin cucumber slices, fresh dill sprinkle, lemon wedge, elegant brunch light
day_of_steps: Toast 1 slice multigrain bread (Diego 45g, Diana 35g) lightly
Spread cream cheese (Diego 30g, Diana 25g) on toast
Layer smoked trout (Diego 80g, Diana 60g), cucumber slices, fresh dill

meals.name: Mixed Nuts & Orange
meals.image_prompt: Fresh peeled orange segments arranged on white plate, mixed unsalted nuts (almonds, walnuts, cashews) in small glass bowl, bright Sunday morning light
day_of_steps: Portion mixed nuts (Diego 32g, Diana 24g) into bowl

meals.name: Vegetable & Lentil Buddha Bowl with Tahini Dressing
meals.image_prompt: Colorful Buddha bowl with fluffy quinoa base, roasted beets, roasted sweet potato, shredded purple cabbage, crispy chickpeas, fresh spinach, drizzle of creamy tahini dressing, lemon slice, sunset light
prep_steps: Cook 0.5 cup dry red lentils to completion, portion into containers (Diego 1.25 cups, Diana 1 cup)
Cook 400g quinoa (measure: ~1 cup dry), portion into containers (Diego 160g cooked, Diana 120g cooked)
Prepare tahini dressing (tahini, lemon, water, garlic), portion into containers (Diego 80ml, Diana 60ml)
Prep roasted vegetables: beets, sweet potato, carrots, radishes; portion into containers
day_of_steps: Add lentils, roasted vegetables, fresh spinach leaves
Top with fresh herbs (parsley), serve with 500ml water

meals.name: Almonds & Blueberries
meals.image_prompt: Fresh blueberries mounded in white ceramic bowl, roasted whole almonds scattered beside on natural wood surface, bright afternoon light, clean simple style

meals.name: Pan-Seared Scallops with Zucchini Noodles, Cherry Tomatoes & Basil
meals.image_prompt: Three golden-seared scallops with caramelized tops, bed of fresh zucchini noodles (zoodles), burst cherry tomatoes, fresh basil leaves, drizzle of olive oil and lemon, elegant plating, warm candlelit light
prep_steps: Pat dry & portion 7 scallop servings (Diego 200g/~8 scallops, Diana 150g/~6 scallops), store in separate airtight containers on ice
Spiralize zucchini into noodles, portion into containers (Diego 3 cups raw, Diana 2.5 cups raw)
Halve cherry tomatoes, store in container (Diego 250g, Diana 200g)
day_of_steps: Heat 1.5 tsp olive oil in skillet over medium-high heat
Season scallops with sea salt & white pepper
Sear scallops 2 min per side until opaque (do not overcook)
In separate pan, sauté zucchini noodles 2 min, season lightly
Warm cherry tomatoes in pan 1 min
Plate zoodles, top with scallops, scatter tomatoes, fresh basil, serve with lemon wedge & 500ml water
